Projects

A Unified Logging System

Australia Post operates optical character recognition based mail sorting machines. Occasionally they have faults which vary in severity. These faults are logged and sent to a central server for analysis. This project focussed on developing tools to allow technicians and managers to view and analyse these faults in an intuitive manner with the aim of using this information to improve mail delivery service and reduce costs along the way.

Download

Cisco NetFlow Collector and Analyser

UltraFlow is an application for collecting and analysing Cisco Netflow data. It is written in Python, wxPython, Matplotlib, SQLite and the Python based Twisted network programming framework.

Download
